title: Breakout-Retest with Volatility Expansion and Mechanical Bad-Regime Gate -- IN-SAMPLE baseline (NQ daily, 2013-2022 only)

provenance.head_note: HEAD bdcca5a is a JARVIS-only background-automation commit (app.py, templates/jarvis.html, tests/test_jarvis_route.py, tools/jarvis_file_hygiene_report.py); it touched NO agentic_factory file and S28-D3 (e7ce9a9) remains its ancestor. The frozen engine was run unmodified.

inputs.oos_confirmation: The 2023/2024/2025 CSVs exist on disk but were never opened; the runner asserts no OOS year string appears in any loaded path. OOS remains SEALED per S28-D2.

data_qa.qa_verdict: CLEAN -- no duplicate dates, no invalid OHLC rows, no out-of-range rows; every bar falls in 2013-2022.

metrics.exit_reason_note: 8 losers all -1R hard stops; 3 winners hit +2R target; 1 winner exited via 20-bar time stop at +1.28R (2017).
metrics.best_trade_share_of_net: undefined (net is negative; best trade is +2.0R against a -0.72R net)

anti_donchian_top3_gate.note: Net is already NEGATIVE with all trades included; removing the top 3 winners drives it to -6.72R. The Donchian fat-tail-dependence failure mode is present in the strongest possible form.

setup_diagnostics_non_authoritative.note: find_setups_or_entries() does NOT model the one-position / one-active-setup constraint, so its counts are a diagnostic superset and are NOT the trade count. The authoritative trade count is 12 from simulate_s28().

s28_d2_prescreen.note: Pre-registered S28-D2 thresholds applied to IS only (PASS/WATCH/FAIL). OOS gates are NOT evaluated here (OOS sealed).

top3_winner_dependence.pass: IS net positive after removing top 3

max_dd_cap.value: IS max DD 4.0R vs IS net -0.72R
max_dd_cap.pass: IS max DD <= IS net R
max_dd_cap.fail: IS max DD > 1.5x IS net R
max_dd_cap.result: FAIL (net is negative; drawdown cap automatically breached)

verdict_basis: Every pre-registered IS hard floor is breached: trade count 12 (<20), profit factor 0.91 (<1.15), expectancy -0.06R (<=0), only 3/10 positive years (<5/10), and the anti-Donchian top-3 gate fails decisively (net -0.72R, net-ex-top-3 -6.72R). The record is net-negative and entirely carried by 3 fat-tail winners -- exactly the Donchian failure mode S28 was designed to avoid.
conservative_interpretation: On its own pre-registered IS terms, S28 v1 shows no edge. The selective stack (rising-trend filter + 55-bar high + range expansion + volume expansion + retest-hold + bad-regime gate) is so restrictive that it produced only 12 trades in 10 years, and those 12 are net-negative with brittle fat-tail dependence. This is a clean negative -- not 'inconclusive'. Per the S28-D2 anti-overfit rules and the explicit 'do not continue inconclusive like S26' instruction, S28 should be PARKED as IS_FAIL. No parameter changes, no filter tweaks, no OOS peek are permitted on this branch; any new idea opens a NEW pre-registered branch.
recommendation: NONE. No trading, no paper, no live, no OOS. PARK S28 as IS_FAIL. Donchian, S26, S27 remain PARKED. Do NOT proceed to S28-D5/OOS (the 2023-2025 seal stays intact). Do NOT optimize or re-tune S28 in place (anti-overfit rule). A future hypothesis must start a fresh pre-registered branch.
trading_recommendation: NONE. S28 is PARKED IS_FAIL on a net-negative, fat-tail-dependent in-sample record.
